creator: kwm@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 167073
glib and friends c++ bindings

Update of the glib and friends c++ bindings.

Due to these now requiring c++11 to build, I think we should start with only 1 exp-run on 9.3 (either i386 or amd64 is fine). This is because the base compile in 10 and HEAD is new enough that it understands this c++ standard.
